recentTweets.text:
The American people want affordable groceries, lower housing costs, and safer communities, not another war overseas.

Donald Trump promised no new wars. Instead, he chose a war with Iran and has repeatedly violated the ceasefire. https://t.co/ZDquV2m1tN

I voted to block $3.3B in unconditional military aid to Netanyahu. 

Netanyahu himself said he doesn't need our financial support. And I agree.

Our federal budget must reflect our deepest values and protect human rights.👇🏾 https://t.co/u0C4b6tlvU

As Illinois moves through its second major heat wave of the summer, I urge everyone to prioritize safety. 

Please check on your neighbors, especially seniors, stay in air-conditioned spaces, and drink plenty of water. Look out for your neighbors. 

View resources:

For nearly a century, handguns have been barred from USPS mail to keep us safe.

Now we know why the Trump Administration wants to rip up that rule: to line his family’s pockets. We cannot let President Trump gut background checks just so his family can profit. https://t.co/xl6CNChuoS

📈 Inflation is up. 
📈 Grocery prices are up. 
📈 Energy bills are up. 
📈 Healthcare premiums are up.

Make no mistake: Donald Trump is FAILING to deliver on his promise to lower costs for hardworking families. 

Everyday Americans cannot wait while this administration refuses https://t.co/xWPrfgC2v8

My office is now accepting intern applications for Fall 2026!

Interns gain firsthand experience about constituent services, legislation, and communications. If you’re interested, please apply using this link: https://t.co/8s2oA2Ta0N https://t.co/J1NfTOjWQX

Join my office on July 25th for my privacy fair event in Matteson.

We will be providing onsite document shredding and identity theft prevention resources.

Pre-register: https://t.co/Kcdv22yy6n https://t.co/AglmA5PUxC

Trump's war with Iran has been a disaster from the start.  

Now he demands another $350 million to continue his reckless war.   

That’s enough money to restore the enhanced ACA premium tax credits permanently, lowering healthcare costs for 20 million Americans.

CMS claims ICE didn't use the data, but they just tried to formalize sharing enrollee locations with ICE in November.

Healthcare is a fundamental human right, not a trapdoor for cruel immigration enforcement.

All families deserve to see a doctor without fearing government surveillance.

According to a court filing, HHS leaked Medicaid data to ICE, violating the privacy of Medicaid enrollees and putting the health and well-being of millions at risk. 🧵 https://t.co/1IqtGaF1ic

I led a letter to CMS last year calling out their efforts to weaponize our health data, destroying public trust and breaking federal law. 
Read the letter: 
https://t.co/8o8vZ7D2F8

Republicans are celebrating one year since the Big Ugly Law, a horrible piece of legislation that steals from hardworking people and gives more to the wealthy.

In my district alone, 27,000 people will pay more for their healthcare, while another 31,000 people could lose their https://t.co/zXAK6U2Zb4

From neighborhood playgrounds and forest preserves to the Pullman National Historical Park, our parks connect us to nature, our history, and each other. 

I'm proud that Illinois' Second District is home to so many incredible places to explore this National Parks and Recreation https://t.co/mKHGA2y5cN

Republicans cut Medicaid by $880 billion. 
It’s cruel.
It’s evil. 
It’s against our mandate as public servants.

I will not remain silent while Republicans continue to take away healthcare access.

Medicaid saves lives. Period. https://t.co/9rItsEi2K7

Imagine what we could accomplish if Republicans and Trump put Americans first instead of wasting billions on chosen wars and vanity projects.

That money could strengthen our schools, lower costs, expand healthcare, and invest in our communities. https://t.co/DirBHQWlOZ

Taking food away from hungry children isn't cutting waste, fraud, or abuse. It is just plain cruel. 

Trump and Republicans cut $187 BILLION from food assistance because they'd rather reward the wealthy than help struggling families put dinner on the table.

I've heard from too many seniors who are worried about gun violence, Medicaid, and Social Security. 

After a lifetime of hard work, they deserve security and peace of mind. https://t.co/c6nFC8parW

Millions of Americans are struggling to afford basic necessities and a roof over their heads.  

Meanwhile, Trump says the housing affordability crisis is “so unimportant” and “a big yawn.” He can barely manage to stay awake—much less lower costs for Americans. https://t.co/xbKcMFxU6Q

Thank you to the @APApsychiatric for the 2025 Jacob Javits Public Service Award. I will continue my fight to ensure every family can access the healthcare and substance use care they need. https://t.co/V4cltWXRTY

Your family is paying more because of the Republican inability to stand up to President Trump.

They are complicit in allowing Trump’s tariffs and war in Iran to continue.

Reminder!

This Wednesday, July 8th, I will host mobile office hours at the Rantoul Business Center. If you need assistance with a federal agency, my staff will be there to assist you. 

Learn more: https://t.co/P5OdDj1gbr https://t.co/wfkSYL3MpM

As we mark the 250th anniversary of our nation’s founding, we reflect on the ideals of freedom, equality, and opportunity that define America. 

We also recognize the gap between those ideals and lived reality for many.   

I will continue fighting to ensure everyone can fully https://t.co/l8P87d3bFs

Did you know that my office can help you navigate federal agencies?  

For help, visit: https://t.co/ftgehWELU6

Happy Independence Day! 

Today, we celebrate our country, our community, and the shared values that bring us together as we continue to fight for a more perfect union. https://t.co/cZiyyKPfL5

Four years ago today, Highland Park was changed forever when a gunman shot and killed 7 people and injured 48 more.  

I will continue my fight until we are free from gun violence at a parade, on the sidewalk, in our homes, at school, and in our communities. https://t.co/PjusNoZhpX

House Republicans passed Trump’s Big Ugly Law one year ago. It’s a deadly attack on public health. 

Cuts to Medicaid will rip away healthcare, close local hospitals, and overwhelm emergency rooms. 

Trump and his allies are playing politics with your healthcare. https://t.co/HCgRp1FJFn
Stay up-to-date with my work in DC and the Second Congressional District of Illinois by signing up for my eNewsletter: https://t.co/h41Xn8SSJ8

Trump is wasting millions of taxpayer dollars.

That money should’ve made healthcare more affordable for millions or helped lower costs for hardworking families.

Instead, he's spending it on himself and vanity projects. https://t.co/YUVwcRKEo1

For nearly a century, handguns have been barred from USPS mail to keep us safe.

Now we know why the Trump Admin wants to rip up that rule: to line his family’s pockets. We can't gut background checks just so Trump can profit.

https://t.co/J4ntOaXNUd https://t.co/J4ntOaXNUd

This week, the Supreme Court reaffirmed the constitutional right that if you’re born in the United States, you ARE an American citizen.   

Trump and his ICE agents don’t get to abuse the Constitution for his anti-immigrant agenda. 

https://t.co/NqoCW1CfMZ

With heat indices pushing up to 115 degrees this holiday weekend, I am asking everyone to look out for their neighbors.

Please check on seniors, stay in air-conditioned spaces, and drink plenty of water. 

View resources & learn more: https://t.co/4YmlTXAYUo

Illinois farmers are suffering because of Trump’s failed trade policies and chosen war. 

The people who feed America deserve better. 

My Republican colleagues should stop playing politics and work with Democrats to deliver the support our farmers need. 
https://t.co/RtiwdDqgb5

Speaker Johnson sent Congress home early yet again because he’s terrified of holding a vote that might upset the president.

This isn’t the first time he’s blocked us from doing our jobs. It’s lazy, it’s disrespectful, and the American people deserve much better.

Happy National Postal Worker Day! 

My mom and brother retired from the postal service, so I know how tough you work to deliver everything from letters and packages to life-saving medications and ballots across the country!

Thank you! https://t.co/b1eS0LcGnJ

Joined Richard Chew and @HeartlandSignal at the Ida B. Wells Festival over the weekend.

Trump and his Republican allies are working overtime to rig the system and strip away Black voting power.

I will not be bullied into silence while they try to roll back hard-earned civil https://t.co/Qs2X18lv62

Americans need real, commonsense gun safety laws.

Republicans in Congress must join @HouseDemocrats in standing up to the gun lobby and act to make sure that every family can live free from fear. https://t.co/cW5CjmCQcD

Congress passed a bipartisan housing bill to bring down costs, build homes, and take on corporate landlords. 

Trump is holding it hostage, choosing his own political survival over real housing relief for families who are struggling right now.

Thank you to @RepKamlagerDove for joining my Congressional Youth Cabinet this weekend. 

Investing in young leaders isn’t optional; it’s how we build safer, stronger communities. 

I will continue my fight to make sure their voices shape the future. https://t.co/AIapPBdKwi

Healthcare should be a fundamental right, not a luxury.

But because of cuts to Medicaid in the Republican’s Big Ugly law and the end of enhanced ACA tax credits, 36,247 people in my district will lose coverage. 

I am fighting to protect our healthcare, not corporate greed.

The National Guard will not make Chicago safer.

Donald Trump's repeated threats to deploy troops aren't about reducing crime. It’s an abuse of power designed to instill fear and reinforce the reckless ICE raids that have terrorized Black and Brown communities across our city. https://t.co/0cFx6SxuUp

Chicago does not need empty threats from Donald Trump. Our city needs real action.

Restore funding for violence intervention programs. Reopen the White House Office of Gun Violence Prevention. Stop making it easier for illegal guns to reach our communities.

Lives depend on it. https://t.co/NqeCvaHm5L

🏳️‍🌈Happy Pride, Chicago! 🏳️‍🌈

Today, we celebrate love and who we are—exactly as we are. You are Free To Be Proud! I will always show up, speak up, and stand up for YOU. https://t.co/F8FvMZuI45

Every mother deserves high-quality, equitable healthcare, regardless of her zip code or skin color. 

I am proud to stand with the @DemWomenCaucus as a united front to center abortion access, maternal care, and women’s health in our national policies.

https://t.co/qVhWRZzBpv

Trump’s war in Iran sent gas prices skyrocketing to an average of $4.21 per gallon in Illinois.

Hardworking Americans are paying the price for Trump’s reckless foreign policy every time at the gas station.

Now, Trump wants another $80 billion to fund his war. https://t.co/n3D4M1ophX

There aren’t many people who understand the impact of gun violence like these community leaders. 

Maria, Diane, and Father Pfleger: thank you for your tireless work to end the gun violence epidemic. I am grateful to be in this work with each of you.

Public health means safe neighborhoods, clean air and water, healthy food, mental health support, affordable healthcare, and freedom from gun violence. 

Every person, regardless of zipcode, deserves the best public health.

Every empty seat at a family dinner table tells a story. 

Behind every gun violence statistic is a person who was loved and a family that has been forever changed. 

I will never stop fighting for policies and laws that will save lives.

Eleven years ago, Obergefell affirmed that LOVE is LOVE and that every couple deserves equal protection under the law.  

Marriage equality changed lives for countless people, and I will always fight to protect those rights. https://t.co/swHyv3cunn

As proud as I was four years ago to pass the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, I am equally as angry that the Trump administration is trying to undo all our progress.

They are making it easier to illegally traffic guns and harder to investigate gun crimes.

This will cost people https://t.co/GrdxgCaTh1

Guns are the leading cause of death for children and teens in the US.

That is absolutely unacceptable. It should shake Congress awake into action—but instead, Republicans are rolling back our progress and endangering our kids. https://t.co/aMs2g8xNVq

When the Supreme Court gutted key voting protections in Shelby County v. Holder 13 years ago, Justice Ginsburg dissented and warned us. 

Now, SCOTUS has completely gutted the Voting Rights Act. 

This moment requires everyone to speak out loud and clear in defense of our https://t.co/7qIOtxonAF

It was wonderful to celebrate Juneteenth with the Southland Regional Mayors Black Caucus!

I’m proud of what we’ve accomplished together to bring progress, opportunity, and innovation to communities across the Southland. https://t.co/CLe6Qg0UOd

The list of lives stolen by gun violence is far too long.

I carry the names of victims and their families with me every time I walk into Congress. Their memories deserve more than thoughts and prayers. They deserve action. https://t.co/pA71bQoHi8

Instead of lowering rent and mortgage costs, Trump is prioritizing election conspiracies and his own political survival over a bipartisan housing affordability bill. How on brand for the President.
https://t.co/2weX7AKFmi

I stand with @RepLaMonica. 

She’s facing 17 years in prison for doing her job, for conducting constitutional oversight and demanding answers from ICE. 

Black women have always stood up to protect our communities, and LaMonica does not stand alone. https://t.co/BFueZ4YxoS

Four years after SCOTUS overturned Roe, women are still paying the price.

Politicians should not make personal healthcare decisions for patients and their doctors. I’m fighting to restore reproductive freedom and protect your bodily autonomy. https://t.co/y7UHAYHJLK

Every mother deserves high-quality, equitable care, regardless of zip code or skin color. 

I introduced the WELLS Act after my constituent, Mercedes Wells, who was discharged in active labor. 

We need to address inequalities in our healthcare system before it is too late. https://t.co/OuGR3tA6Dn

Millions of American families are struggling to afford basic necessities like groceries and housing.

House Republicans gifted $70 billion to an unaccountable ICE, proving their priorities are completely out of touch with the real pain everyday people are feeling.
RT @RepMikeQuigley: This weekend, Chicago suffered multiple shootings, including at a Juneteenth celebration where a gunman opened fire whi…

I cannot talk about the gun violence epidemic without addressing suicide. 

Access to a gun triples the risk of death, yet Republicans continue to put gun lobby interests over safety.

Their empty thoughts and prayers won't save lives. Passing meaningful reform will. https://t.co/yHG3bhnEDL
